CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '巡店') , TEXT( Store_Inspection_Number_Summary__c ), IF(ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '客户拜访'), TEXT( Customer_Visit_Summary__c), IF(ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '渠道拓展'), TEXT( Customer_Extend_Summary__c), IF(ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '销售额'), TEXT(CurrencyIsoCode) + ' ' + TEXT( ROUND(Daily_Sales_Summary__c,2) ), '') ) ) )
CustomField.label: Complete
